parameters.name: search_repos
parameters.description: Search GitHub repositories by keyword. Parameters: query (search keywords, required), sort ('stars', 'forks', 'updated', optional, default 'stars')

value.sort: ={{ $fromAI('sort', 'Sort by: stars, forks, or updated (default: stars)', 'string') }}

schema.description: Sort by: stars, forks, or updated

parameters.name: get_repo_info
parameters.description: Get detailed info about a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner/org, required), repo (repository name, required)

parameters.name: list_issues
parameters.description: List issues for a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), state ('open', 'closed', or 'all', optional, default 'open')

value.state: ={{ $fromAI('state', 'Issue state: open, closed, or all (default: open)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: create_issue
parameters.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), title (issue title, required), body (issue description, optional), labels (comma-separated label names, optional)

parameters.name: list_pull_requests
parameters.description: List pull requests for a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), state ('open', 'closed', or 'all', optional, default 'open')

value.state: ={{ $fromAI('state', 'PR state: open, closed, or all (default: open)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_pull_request
parameters.description: Get details of a specific pull request including diff stats and reviews. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), pr_number (PR number, required)

parameters.name: get_file_content
parameters.description: Read a file or list a directory from a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required), path (file or directory path, required), ref (branch/tag/commit, optional, default: default branch)

parameters.name: search_code
parameters.description: Search code across GitHub repositories. Parameters: query (search keywords, required), owner (limit to user/org, optional), repo (limit to specific repo, optional — requires owner too)

parameters.name: list_releases
parameters.description: List releases for a GitHub repository. Parameters: owner (repo owner, required), repo (repository name, required)

parameters.name: list_notifications
parameters.description: List your GitHub notifications. Parameters: all ('true' to include read notifications, optional, default only unread)

value.all: ={{ $fromAI('all', 'Include read notifications: true or false (default: false)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_starred
parameters.description: List your starred GitHub repositories. Parameters: sort ('created' or 'updated', optional, default 'created')
